mission.title: coredns: plugin/cache: Add option to adjust SERVFAIL response cache TTL
mission.description:
### 1. Why is this pull request needed and what does it do?

Add an option to customize SERVFAIL response cache TTL within RFC 2308 allowances.
Setting a 0 TTL will disable caching of SERVFAIL responses.

### 2. Which issues (if any) are related?

closes #5074

### 3. Which documentation changes (if any) need to be made?

included

### 4. Does this introduce a backward incompatible change or deprecation?

no
